---
title: "Welcome!"
format: 
  html:
    css: styles.css
    page-layout: full
---

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="30%"}
![](images/Bio_pic.JPG){width=200px}
:::

::: {.column width="70%"}

<h3>My name is Jenna Baljunas, and I study community ecology!</h3>
\
Currently, I am a PhD student in the [Spatial and Community Ecology (SpaCE) Lab](https://www.communityecologylab.com/) at Michigan State University.
